name: Amphibious Bugroth MK-11
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>両</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>用</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バグロス Ｍｋ－１１
desc: While "Umi" is not on the field, this card gains 700 ATK, also it cannot attack directly. While "Umi" is on the field: You can target 1 face-up non-WATER monster on the field; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Amphibious Bugroth MK-11" once per turn.
